panels.title: Accelerometer
panels.description: Raw 3-axis accelerometer readings from the MPU6050 (ax, ay, az), in raw ADC units. Reflects vibration and orientation of the sensor node.

targets.query:
from(bucket: "telemetry")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "telemetry")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "ax" or r._field == "ay" or r._field == "az")
  |> aggregateWindow(every: 1s, fn: mean, createEmpty: false)

panels.title: Gyroscope
panels.description: Raw 3-axis gyroscope readings from the MPU6050 (gx, gy, gz), in raw ADC units. Reflects angular velocity of the sensor node.

targets.query:
from(bucket: "telemetry")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "telemetry")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "gx" or r._field == "gy" or r._field == "gz")
  |> aggregateWindow(every: 1s, fn: mean, createEmpty: false)

panels.title: RPM
panels.description: Fan rotation speed in revolutions per minute, computed from tachometer pulses and recalculated once per second.

targets.query:
from(bucket: "telemetry")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "telemetry")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "rpm")
  |> aggregateWindow(every: 1s, fn: mean, createEmpty: false)

title: Vigilo - Sensor Node Telemetry
description: Live vibration and RPM telemetry from the Vigilo ESP32 sensor node, via MQTT and InfluxDB.
